missing_evidence: Event-shaped accepted-key reticulation evidence for canonical polyploid, hybridization, chromosome, and ploidy cases
candidate_source: Approved local bulk reticulation package from CCDB, Plant DNA C-values, curated hybridization/polyploid literature, or WFO-resolved sidecar rows with event evidence
access_mode: Open/local file ingest only; no aggressive scraping; preserve source identifiers and licenses
minimum_rows_or_coverage: At least 8 canonical seed cases with at least 5 event-shaped accepted-key recoveries, including chromosome or hybridization evidence, and at least 30 additional accepted-key reticulation evidence rows for confound checks
required_join_key: WFO accepted taxon key plus raw source identifier plus event type
first_validation_test: Run Track 1 canonical recovery test, then source-density/family-size controls; reopen only if event-shaped accepted-key recovery clears threshold without changing schema
promotion_risk: Medium: reticulation wording can overstate biological history if event evidence is name-only rather than event-shaped

missing_evidence: Observed crop/CWR coordinate-derived bioclim vectors, accepted-key CWR expansion, and held-out expert comparison rows
candidate_source: Crop/CWR occurrence coordinates from license-clean local GBIF or Genesys/GRIN exports plus WorldClim/CHELSA raster-derived vectors and cited expert recommendation tables
access_mode: Open/local file ingest; no recommendation language until observed vectors and held-out comparison pass
minimum_rows_or_coverage: At least 30 accepted-key crop-wild-relative pairs, at least 10 held-out crops with expert comparison rows, and nonzero observed bioclim vectors for both crop and CWR sides
required_join_key: WFO accepted taxon key for crop and wild relative plus coordinate source record id and climate raster cell id
first_validation_test: Run climate-vector presence test, genus/species agreement against held-out expert rows, sister-species baseline ablation, and same-genus dominance control
promotion_risk: High: climate-substitution text can become recommendation-like before validation and ablation

missing_evidence: Non-Duke temporally resolved phytochemical assertions with isolation or publication dates and family coverage
candidate_source: License-clean KNApSAcK, NPASS, ChEBI-linked literature tables, and ethnobotanical records with date/provenance fields independent of Duke family signals
access_mode: Open/local static datasets or manually approved local exports; no Duke-only promotion
minimum_rows_or_coverage: At least 8 canonical temporal holdouts with assertion dates, at least 5 chemically distinct families, and at least 100 non-Duke taxon-compound rows after accepted-key join
required_join_key: WFO accepted taxon key plus compound identifier plus source date or isolation/publication year
first_validation_test: Run temporal top-decile recovery, no-Duke baseline, source-density matched control, and screening-count matched control
promotion_risk: Medium-high: chemistry priors can be mistaken for undocumented bioactivity or clinical efficacy

missing_evidence: Runnable free/open/local model runtime, local model weights, and audited response rows for static botanical probe questions
candidate_source: Workspace-local or approved local filesystem model weights compatible with an installed open runtime such as llama.cpp, transformers, or another free offline runner
access_mode: Local execution only; no paid, key-gated, remote, or live API model calls
minimum_rows_or_coverage: At least one runnable local model, at least 210 static probe responses, deterministic scoring outputs, and preserved prompt/response provenance
required_join_key: Model artifact path plus model checksum plus probe question id
first_validation_test: Run local availability test, deterministic scorer controls, response audit, category error-rate computation, and prompt-template sensitivity check
promotion_risk: Medium: without audited model responses, benchmark controls can be misread as model performance
